
=== Available Adapters ===
Name               Lane   Description
----------------------------------------------------------------------
amass              slow   Enumerate subdomains and ASN-linked asse
ashok              slow   Ashok — infrastructure reconnaissance to
avito              fast   Search Avito.ru and Yula for seller prof
blackbird          fast   Find usernames across modern platforms u
censys             fast   Use Censys API for hosts, certificates, 
eyewitness         slow   Capture screenshots for discovered URLs 
firms              slow   NASA FIRMS thermal-anomaly corroboration
getcontact         fast   Reverse phone lookup through UA-specific
ghunt              fast   GHunt — Google account reconnaissance.
hibp               fast   Enrich email pivots with breach and past
holehe             fast   Map an email address to services where i
httpx_probe        fast   Probe domains/URLs and return live web s
katana             slow   Discover URLs, endpoints, JS references,
maryam             fast   OWASP Maryam — modular OSINT framework i
metagoofil         slow   Collect emails and usernames leaked via 
naabu              fast   Fast port scan for domains and IPs.
nmap               slow   Top-ports scan with service/version dete
nuclei             slow   Nuclei template-based vulnerability scan
opendatabot        fast   Ukrainian business-registry (ЄДР) deanon
reconng            slow   Execute recon-ng modules against domain/
ru_leak            fast   Search Russian leak databases.
satintel           fast   Satellite Intelligence + EXIF GEOINT ada
search4faces       fast   Search4Faces — facial recognition pivot 
shodan             fast   Query Shodan for internet-facing service
social_analyzer    slow   Social-Analyzer — 1000+ social network u
subfinder          fast   Enumerate passive subdomains for a root 
ua_leak            fast   Search Ukrainian leak databases and mark
ua_phone           fast   Reverse phone lookup through UA-specific
vk_graph           slow   Analyze VK/OK social graph — friend list
web_search         slow   Web search adapter — DuckDuckGo queries
